comment.body: Based on my understanding of her post, she is long term bullish these new computing tech (parallel computing & quantum). It will eventually evolve into a bubble just like the Internet (out of the dot com bubble, emerged the winners of the new era). If AI cannot be monetized soon enough, then the story behind this bull market will be challenged; also there could be unknown second order effects of AI (e.g., how would a 10% or 20% unemployment rate affect the market?)
